exampleSentences: Em sẽ giúp anh dọn dẹp nhà cửa, tất nhiên rồi.
Tất nhiên, chị có thể hỏi bất kỳ câu hỏi nào về bài tập.
Anh ấy trả lời rằng tất nhiên anh sẽ tham gia bữa tiệc sinh nhật.

example.vi: Tất nhiên tôi sẽ giúp bạn nếu bạn cần.
example.en: Of course I will help you if you need.

definitions.en: Used to express that something is obvious or goes without saying.
definitions.vi: Diễn tả điều gì đó là hiển nhiên hoặc không cần phải bàn cãi.

notes:
tất nhiên = of course, naturally. You use it to show something is obvious, expected, or clearly yes.

It’s an adverbial phrase, often placed at the beginning of a sentence for emphasis, or at the end to confirm. You can also use it alone as a short reply. Adding rồi makes it stronger and more casual.

Close synonym: dĩ nhiên (a bit more formal). Stronger, more “logical” tone: hiển nhiên (= obviously).
exampleSentencesTranslated: I will help you clean the house, of course.
Of course, you can ask any questions about the homework.
He replied that of course he would join the birthday party.

translation.en: We will go out, of course.

notes_md:
**tất nhiên** = *of course*, *naturally*. You use it to show something is obvious, expected, or clearly yes.

It’s an adverbial phrase, often placed at the beginning of a sentence for emphasis, or at the end to confirm. You can also use it alone as a short reply. Adding **rồi** makes it stronger and more casual.


Close synonym: **dĩ nhiên** (a bit more formal). Stronger, more “logical” tone: **hiển nhiên** (= obviously).
